---
title: "Teaching"
format: html
page-layout: full
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

This is where I share resources related to courses, workshops, talks and other types of presentations.


### [2026 CeUL - Teaching with desirable difficulties](teaching/2026_Teaching_with_desirable_difficulties.qmd)

Resources for a CeUl workshop about applying teaching strategies informed by the desirable difficulties framework.

### [2026 UL1 - Students' learning and the teacher role](teaching/2026_UL1_students_learning.qmd)

Outline and details about the individual and team practice during the session about Students' learning and the teacher role

### [2026 Resources for workshop on AI supported course development for Stockholm University's "Lärarkonferens 2026":](teaching/2026_teaching_conference.qmd)

Resources for a workshop about using AI as support in course development, focusing on the benefits but also the challenges.

### [2026 ResearchED](teaching/2026_researchED.qmd)

Handouts for two prestentations at researchED Scandinavia 2026

### [2026 Apple Game Simulation for Stockholm Bayes Club](teaching/apple_game_simulation.qmd)

Simulates the outcome of a game found in a Basme comic book for Stockholm Bayes Club

### [2026 Resources for workshop about Test-enhanced learning and using AI to support the development of questions:](teaching/retrieval_practice_and_ai_workshop.qmd)

Resources for a test-enhanced learning (retrieval practice), and how AI might support development of questions and feedback.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
